rag_rules: Assume statements must be placed in component types, not implementations
AGREE contracts are scoped to component type annexes for assumptions and guarantees
generic_rules: Validator diagnostics pointing to implementation-level references in type annexes should be resolved by moving valid bindings to implementation annexes
AGREE syntax requires that all identifiers and types be visible in the current scope and properly declared
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component implementations may only contain assignments and bindings valid in that scope
anti_patterns: Placing assume statements in implementation annexes instead of component type annexes
Referencing implementation-level paths or subcomponents in component type contracts
